zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas於1442年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾拉格藍時，他的父親Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke19歲，母親Maud Verch Adam Tuberville16歲。他於大約1494年與Lady Margred Gwilym在威爾士卡馬特史爾結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1505年住在英國賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德。他去世於1510年9月12日在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德享年68歲，埋葬在威爾士蒙姆爾阿加文尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas于1442年出生在威尔士蒙姆爾拉格藍时，他的父亲Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke19岁，母亲Maud Verch Adam Tuberville16岁。他于大约1494年与Lady Margred Gwilym在威尔士卡馬特史爾结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1505年住在英国賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德。他去世于1510年9月12日在英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德享年68岁，埋葬在威尔士蒙姆爾阿加文尼。

nameMeanings.name: Herbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German, English, and French: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements heri, hari ‘army’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. In Britain, this Old French name, introduced by the Normans, reinforced the less common Old English cognate Herebeorht. The surname was taken to Ireland after the Anglo-Norman invasion and in the 16th century.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the German personal name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Harbison
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): patronymic from the Older Scots and Middle English personal name Herbert (the change from -er- to -ar- was a common one in Old French and Middle English). An intrusive n later gave Harbinson .

variants.name: Hebard
meanings: English (Surrey):
variant of Herbert , with assimilation of the first r. Compare Hebb .
variant of   Hibbert  .

variants.name: Harbert
meanings: German and English: variant of   Herbert  .

variants.name: Herbers
meanings: German and Dutch: patronymic from   Herbert  . It is found mainly in Lower Saxony and across the Dutch border.

variants.name: Dickherber
meanings: Probably a nickname for a fat person by the name of Herbert , of which Herber is a short form, or, more likely, in the north from Die(c)kherber, a topographic and distinguishing name for a Herber living by the dike, see Dicke 2. Compare Dickmeyer .

variants.name: Hebert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Emile, Normand, Jacques, Marcel, Pierre, Lucien, Michel, Gaston, Alcide, Camille.
French (Hébert): assimilated form of Herbert . Compare Abair , Abar , Abare , Abear , Aber , Eber , and Ebert .
German: variant of   Heber   1.

variants.name: Herber
meanings: German and Dutch: variant of   Herbert  .

variants.name: Herbertson
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): patronymic from the Older Scots and Middle English personal name   Herbert  .

variants.name: Hebb
meanings: English (East Yorkshire and northeast Midlands): from the Middle English personal name Hebb, Ebb, pet forms of Herbert .

variants.name: Herb
meanings: South German: nickname for a harsh or rough person, from Middle High German herb ‘tart, harsh’.
German: from the personal name Herpo, a pet form of Herbert .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas was born in 1442, in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales, his father, Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke, was 19 and his mother, Maud Verch Adam Tuberville, was 16. He married Lady Margred Gwilym about 1494, in Carmarthenshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 4 daughters. He lived in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England in 1505. He died on 12 September 1510, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68, and was buried in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas est né en 1442, à Raglan, Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Maud Verch Adam Tuberville, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margred Gwilym environ 1494, à Carmarthenshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles. Il a vécu à Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Angleterre en 1505. Il est décédé le 12 septembre 1510, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas 1442 in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke 19 und seine Mutter Maud Verch Adam Tuberville 16. Er hat um 1494 in Carmarthenshire, Wales Lady Margred Gwilym geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1505 hat er in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England gelebt. Er starb am 12. September 1510 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales begraben.

Lui sposato Lady Margred Gwilym circa 1494, nel Carmarthenshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 4 figlie. Vissuto a Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England nel 1505. ja.Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales: ウェールズモンモウスシュアイアラグラン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyasが1442年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアラグランで生まれた時，父Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembrokeは19歳，母Maud Verch Adam Tubervilleは16歳であった。約1494年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアでLady Margred Gwilymと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1505年にはイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエウヤス ハロルドに住んでいた。彼は1510年9月12日にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードで68歳で死去し，ウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas(이)가 1442년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 라글런에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Verch Adam Tuberville(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1494년 웨일스 카마테실르에서 Lady Margred Gwilym(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1505년도에 영국 허퍼드실르 와이아스 하로드에서 살았다. 그는 1510년 9월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에 묻혔다.

pt.Swansea, West Glamorgan, Wales, United K: Swansea, West Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas nasceu em 1442, em Raglan, Monmouthshire, Gales, seu pai, Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Maud Verch Adam Tuberville, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margred Gwilym aproximadamente 1494, em Carmarthenshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele viveu em Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra em 1505. Ele faleceu em 12 de setembro de 1510, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas родился в 1442 г. в местности раглан, монмоутшир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Verch Adam Tuberville, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margred Gwilym около 1494 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он жил в местности ювяс харолд, хирефордшир, Англия в 1505 году. Он умер 12 сентября 1510 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности абиргавенни, монмоутшир, Уэльс.

es.Swansea, West Glamorgan, Wales, United K: Swansea, West Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas nació en 1442, en Raglan, Monmouthshire, Gales, su papá, Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Maud Verch Adam Tuberville, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Lady Margred Gwilym aproximadamente 1494, en Carmarthenshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 4 hijas. Vivió en Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra en 1505. Murió el 12 de septiembre de 1510, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales.
